title: Safety Policy Config
description: Safety policy enforcing external-only prototype operation with runtime injection disabled.

gameFolderWritesAllowed.description: Must be false. Writing to game install directories is prohibited.

runtimeInjectionAllowed.description: Must be false. Runtime injection is disabled.

antiTamperBypassAllowed.description: Must be false. Anti-tamper bypasses are prohibited.

prohibitedPaths.description: List of prohibited file system paths.

prohibitedTerms.description: List of prohibited terms and phrases.
